title: Ehtanai Kalamai Emgee Nindren
lyrics:
[Minsara kanna manna song tune]
Ethanai kalamai engee nindren..
Naan Ethanai kalamai engee nindren..
Guru Ragavendranin pada thanai kana [Ethanai]
Pithanai pol manathil pesi nindren..
Naan Athanuiym kana aaval konden [Ethani]
Guru vadivai vantha Gopalane..
Kuraikalai theerhu vaitha Gopalane..
KArunai kadal pol vandhu
KArunai kadal pol vandhu Poothavane..
Kama malar thazh thanthu kathavane [Ethanai]
Guru Ragavendra Guru Ragavenra Guru Ragavenra Guru Raya..
Guru Ragavendra Guru Ragavenra Guru Ragavenra Guru Raya..
<<PAGE:200>>
Guru Ragavendra Guru Ragavenra Guru Ragavenra Guru Raya..
[Enthamalai sevithalum ragam]
